title: FunctionDeclaration
description: Structured representation of a function declaration as defined by the OpenAPI 3.0 specification. Included in this declaration are the function name and parameters.

name.description: Required. The name of the function. Must be a-z, A-Z, 0-9, or contain underscores and dashes, with a maximum length of 63.

description.description: Required. A brief description of the function.

parameters.description: Describes the parameters to this function. Reflects the Open API 3.03 Parameter Object. String key: the name of the parameter. Parameter names are case sensitive. Schema Value: the Schema defining the type used for the parameter.
